# Cleric Class Feats — Player Core (PF2e Remastered)

Complete reference of all Cleric class feats from Player Core (PC), including shared feats that also appear on the Cleric feat list.

Source: [Archives of Nethys](https://2e.aonprd.com/) — Player Core pg. 101–121

---

## Level 1 (7 feats)

### Reach Spell *(Shared)*
- **ID:** 4577 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Bard, Cleric, Concentrate, Druid, Oracle, Sorcerer, Spellshape, Witch, Wizard
- **Action:** ⬻ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 101
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You can extend the range of your spells. If the next action you use is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase that spell's range by 30 feet. As is standard for increasing spell ranges, if the spell normally has a range of touch, you extend its range to 30 feet.
- **Leads To:** Knowledge of Shapes

### Deadly Simplicity
- **ID:** 4642 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 113
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your deity's weapon is especially dangerous in your hands. When you are wielding your deity's favored weapon, increase the damage die of that weapon by one step. If your deity's favored weapon is an unarmed attack (such as a fist) and its damage die is smaller than d6, instead increase its damage die to d6.

### Divine Castigation
- **ID:** 4643 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 113
- **Prerequisites:** holy or unholy trait
- **Description:** You extend the dominion of your faith with each spell you cast. When you damage a creature that has the opposing trait to your holy or unholy trait with a harm or heal spell, the target also takes 1 spirit damage per spell rank.
- **Leads To:** Castigating Weapon

### Domain Initiate
- **ID:** 4644 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 113
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your deity bestows a special spell related to their powers. Select one domain offered by your deity. You gain an initial domain spell for that domain, a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a focus spell. Your focus pool increases by 1 Focus Point.
- **Special:** You can select this feat multiple times, selecting a different domain each time and gaining its domain spell.
- **Leads To:** Advanced Domain

### Harming Hands
- **ID:** 4645 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 113
- **Prerequisites:** harming font
- **Description:** The divine energy you channel is especially harmful. When you cast harm, you roll d10s instead of d8s.

### Healing Hands
- **ID:** 4646 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 113
- **Prerequisites:** healing font
- **Description:** Your healing is especially potent. When you cast heal, you roll d10s instead of d8s.
- **Leads To:** Magic Hands

### Premonition of Avoidance
- **ID:** 4647 | **Level:** 1
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 114
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your deity grants you advance warning of danger. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to Perception and to saving throws against hazards.
- **Leads To:** Shared Avoidance, Premonition of Clarity

---

## Level 2 (8 feats)

### Cantrip Expansion *(Shared)*
- **ID:** 4580 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Bard, Cleric, Magus, Oracle, Psychic, Sorcerer, Witch, Wizard
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 101
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** A greater understanding of your magic broadens your range of simple spells. You can prepare two additional cantrips each day.

### Communal Healing
- **ID:** 4648 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 114
- **Prerequisites:** healing font
- **Description:** You're a conduit for vitality, and as you channel it through you, it heals you as well. When you cast the heal spell to heal a single creature other than yourself, you regain Hit Points equal to the spell's rank.

### Emblazon Armament
- **ID:** 4649 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Cleric, Exploration
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 114
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Carefully etching a symbol of your deity onto a shield or weapon (an Exploration activity taking 10 minutes), you create a religious emblem. You can have up to four items emblazoned at a time. If you exceed this limit, the symbol on the oldest item fades. Choose one of the following benefits:
  • **Shield:** The shield's Hardness increases by 1 (this doesn't increase the shield's HP or BT).
  • **Weapon:** The wielder gains a +1 status bonus to damage rolls.
- **Leads To:** Emblazon Energy, Emblazon Antimagic

### Panic the Dead
- **ID:** 4650 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 114
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Undead ones tremble at the sight of your faith. You can use your divine font to Panic the Dead. When you present your religious symbol and expend one use of your divine font, each undead creature within a 30-foot emanation must attempt a Will save against your spell DC.
  **Critical Success:** The creature is unaffected.
  **Success:** The creature is frightened 1.
  **Failure:** The creature is frightened 2.
  **Critical Failure:** The creature is frightened 3 and fleeing for 1 round.

### Rapid Response
- **ID:** 4651 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 114
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You channel your divine power with unusual speed, throwing out healing or harm in situations where doing so at full power isn't possible. When you cast a 2-action heal or harm spell, you can reduce the number of actions to 1. If you do, the spell is 2 ranks lower than normal (minimum 1st rank). For example, if you are 7th level and lack a 2nd-rank heal spell, you can use Rapid Response to instead spend 1 action casting heal at 2nd rank, using a 4th-rank slot.

### Sap Life
- **ID:** 4652 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 114
- **Prerequisites:** harming font
- **Description:** You draw the life force from creatures you harm. When you cast a harm spell and damage at least one living creature, you regain Hit Points equal to the spell's rank.

### Versatile Font
- **ID:** 4653 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 114
- **Prerequisites:** harmful font or healing font
- **Description:** As you are equally devout and devoted, you can access your healing or harming power in both forms. You can prepare some of your extra slots from your divine font with heal spells and some with harm spells, as you choose. This doesn't change the number of extra spell slots from your divine font.

### Warpriest's Armor
- **ID:** 4654 | **Level:** 2
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 114
- **Prerequisites:** warpriest (cloistered cleric cannot select)
- **Description:** Your training has improved your use of armor. You gain the armor specialization effects of medium armor. If you have expert proficiency in any weapon or unarmed attacks, you also gain access to the critical specialization effect for those weapons and unarmed attacks.

---

## Level 4 (6 feats)

### Channel Smite
- **ID:** 4655 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Cleric, Divine
- **Action:** ⬺ (2 actions)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 116
- **Prerequisites:** harmful font or healing font
- **Description:** You siphon the destructive energies of positive or negative energy through a melee attack. Make a melee Strike. On a hit, the Strike deals an additional amount of vitality or void damage equal to 1d8 per rank of your highest-rank spell slot, and the target must attempt a basic Fortitude save against your spell DC with this damage. On a critical hit, the target's save result is one degree worse.

### Directed Channel
- **ID:** 4656 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 116
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You can shape the directed power of your channeled energy. When you cast a harmful or healing version of a 2-action harm or heal that has an area, you can change the area to a 60-foot cone instead of a 30-foot emanation.

### Divine Infusion
- **ID:** 4657 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 116
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You carry the blessing of your deity, infusing your actions with their authority. You can cast the *infuse vitality* or *infuse void* spell (whichever matches your divine font) as a divine innate spell. The rank of the spell is half your level, rounded up.

### Raise Symbol
- **ID:** 4658 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** ⬻ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 116
- **Prerequisites:** a religious symbol
- **Description:** You hold up your religious symbol in a defiant gesture. You raise your religious symbol, which has the same effects as Raising a Shield (giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn) except that you must be holding your religious symbol rather than a shield. The religious symbol has Hardness 4, HP 16, and BT 8 while raised (its actual physical HP doesn't change). If your religious symbol is a shield, you can use Raise a Shield instead.
- **Leads To:** Sapping Symbol, Channeling Block

### Restorative Strike
- **ID:** 4659 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** ⬺ (2 actions)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 116
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Requirements:** You have a harm or heal spell you can cast
- **Description:** You balance both sides of the scales, restoring yourself while striking a foe. Cast a 1-action harm or heal spell to heal yourself, expending the spell normally. It loses the manipulate trait when cast this way. Then make a melee Strike. If you make this Strike with your deity's favored weapon, you gain a +1 status bonus to the attack roll. If the Strike hits, you can target a second willing creature to heal the same amount from the spell. This creature can be outside of the spell's range, provided it's adjacent to the enemy you hit.

### Sacred Ground
- **ID:** 4660 | **Level:** 4
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 116
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your faith can consecrate an entire area against your enemies' ideology. You gain the *sacred ground* focus spell. Increase the number of Focus Points in your pool by 1.

---

## Level 6 (6 feats)

### Steady Spellcasting *(Shared)*
- **ID:** 4602 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Bard, Cleric, Druid, Oracle, Psychic, Sorcerer, Witch, Wizard
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 103
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You don't lose spells easily. If a reaction would disrupt your spellcasting action, attempt a DC 15 flat check. If you succeed, your action isn't disrupted.
- **Leads To:** Battlefield Arcana, Ward Casting

### Cast Down
- **ID:** 4661 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Cleric, Concentrate, Spellshape
- **Action:** ⬻ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 116
- **Prerequisites:** harmful font
- **Description:** The weight of your deity's displeasure forces sinners to bow before you. If the next action you use is to cast harm targeting one creature, the target is also knocked prone on a failure or critical failure against the save (in addition to the normal effects of the spell).

### Divine Rebuttal
- **ID:** 4662 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Trigger:** An enemy within 60 feet casts a divine spell
- **Description:** You call upon your deity to shatter the divine power protecting your enemy's spell. Attempt to counteract the triggering spell using your spell attack modifier or spell DC – 10.

### Divine Weapon
- **ID:** 4663 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You Arsenal of faith extends to sanctified weaponry. If you worship a deity, the weapon gains the effect of a *striking* rune. When wielding your deity's favored weapon and you have dealt damage with that weapon on this turn, you gain a +1 status bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.

### Magic Hands
- **ID:** 4664 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** Healing Hands
- **Description:** The blessing of your deity heightens your healing ability, integrating magical healing with the mundane. When you succeed at a Medicine check to Treat Wounds, you can roll d10s instead of d8s for the healing and add a status bonus to the healing equal to your level.

### Selective Energy
- **ID:** 4665 | **Level:** 6
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** As you call down divine power, you can prevent some enemies from benefiting or some allies from being hurt. When you cast a version of harm or heal that has an area, you can designate up to 5 creatures in the area. They are not targeted by the spell.

---

## Level 8 (9 feats)

### Advanced Domain
- **ID:** 4666 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** Domain Initiate
- **Description:** Your prayers have unlocked deeper secrets of your deity's domain. You gain an advanced domain spell from one of your domains for which you have an initial domain spell.
- **Special:** You can select this feat multiple times. Each time, you must select a different advanced domain spell.
- **Leads To:** Deity's Protection

### Cremate Undead
- **ID:** 4667 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your overwhelming vitality sets undead alight. When you use a heal spell to damage undead, each undead that takes damage also takes persistent fire damage equal to the spell's rank.

### Emblazon Energy
- **ID:** 4668 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** Emblazon Armament
- **Description:** With elemental forces, you make your emblazoned symbols more potent. When you Emblazon an Armament, you can choose from the following effects instead of the effects listed in that feat. These effects have the same restrictions as the base options.
  • **Shield:** Choose acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. The wielder gains the shield's circumstance bonus to saving throws against that damage type and can use Shield Block against damage of that type. The shield also gains resistance to that damage type equal to half your level if you have a domain spell with a trait matching that type (such as fire ray).
  • **Weapon:** Choose acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic. The weapon deals an extra 1d4 damage of that type. Increase this extra damage to 1d6 if you have a domain spell with a trait matching that type (such as fire ray).

### Martyr
- **ID:** 4669 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric, Spellshape
- **Action:** ⬻ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You go to extreme lengths to support your allies, even when it means bringing harm to yourself. If your next action is to cast harm or heal to restore Hit Points to a single ally, you can channel your own vitality along with the spell. You lose 1d8 Hit Points per rank of the spell, which can't be reduced or mitigated in any way, and your ally regains an equal number of Hit Points.

### Restorative Channel
- **ID:** 4670 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** healing font
- **Description:** You can remove conditions with divine grace. You can sacrifice one heal spell you've prepared in your extra slots from your healing font to cast one of the following spells instead: *cleanse affliction*, *clear mind*, *sound body*, or *sure footing*. The spell is heightened to the same rank as the spell you sacrificed.

### Sanctify Armament
- **ID:** 4671 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric, Divine
- **Action:** ⬻ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** holy or unholy trait
- **Description:** You touch a weapon and bring it into concordance with your deity. For 1 round, that weapon gains your holy or unholy trait. It also deals an additional 2d6 spirit damage to creatures of the opposed trait. For example, if you are holy, the weapon would deal an extra 2d6 spirit damage to unholy creatures. If you use Sanctify Armament again, any previous use of it expires.
- **Leads To:** Lasting Armament

### Surging Focus
- **ID:** 4672 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You draw upon your reserves to channel more divine energy. If you have spent at least 2 Focus Points since the last time you Refocused, you recover 2 Focus Points when you Refocus instead of 1.

### Void Siphon
- **ID:** 4673 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 117
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** The raw energy of the Void saps the essence of the living. Any living creature that critically fails its save against a harm spell you cast is drained 1.

### Zealous Rush
- **ID:** 4674 | **Level:** 8
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 118
- **Trigger:** You cast a divine spell that takes 1 action or more to cast and that affects only you or your equipment
- **Description:** You bless yourself on the move. Stride up to 10 feet. If the spell took 2 or more actions, you can Stride up to your full Speed instead.

---

## Level 10 (5 feats)

### Castigating Weapon
- **ID:** 4675 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 118
- **Prerequisites:** Divine Castigation
- **Description:** The force of your deity's castigation strengthens your body so you can strike down the enemy and its allies. After you deal spirit damage due to Divine Castigation, your weapon or unarmed Strikes gain your holy or unholy trait and deal additional spirit damage until the end of your turn. The spirit damage is equal to the rank of harm or heal you dealt spirit damage with, and is in addition to any spirit damage the weapon already deals (such as from a holy rune).

### Heroic Recovery
- **ID:** 4676 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Cleric, Concentrate, Spellshape
- **Action:** ⬻ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 118
- **Prerequisites:** healing font
- **Description:** The restorative power of your healing invigorates the recipient. If the next action you use is to cast heal targeting a single living creature and the target regains Hit Points from the spell, the target also gains three bonuses until the end of its next turn: a +5-foot status bonus to its Speed, a +1 status bonus to attack rolls, and a +1 status bonus to damage rolls. In addition, if the target is prone, it can immediately Stand as a free action that doesn't trigger reactions.

### Replenishment of War
- **ID:** 4677 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 118
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Throwing yourself into battle renews your divine connection. When you damage a creature with a Strike using your deity's favored weapon, you regain 1 Focus Point. You can gain no more than 1 Focus Point per 10 minutes this way.
- **Leads To:** Shared Replenishment

### Shared Avoidance
- **ID:** 4678 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 118
- **Prerequisites:** Premonition of Avoidance
- **Description:** You can project your premonitions of danger to your allies. When you use Premonition of Avoidance, allies within 20 feet of you who are rolling the same saving throw against the same hazard also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to their saving throws.

### Shield of Faith
- **ID:** 4679 | **Level:** 10
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 118
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your deity protects you with a blazing shield of divine energy. You gain the *shield of faith* focus spell. Increase the number of Focus Points in your pool by 1.

---

## Level 12 (6 feats)

### Defensive Recovery
- **ID:** 4680 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Cleric, Concentrate, Spellshape
- **Action:** ⬻ (1 action)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 118
- **Prerequisites:** harmful font or healing font
- **Description:** Your healing spells bolster the target's defenses. If the next action you use is to cast harm or heal on a single target and the target regains Hit Points from the spell, it also gains a +2 status bonus to AC and saving throws for 1 round.

### Domain Focus
- **ID:** 4681 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 118
- **Prerequisites:** Domain Initiate
- **Description:** Your devotion to your deity's domains grows even further. If you have spent at least 2 Focus Points since the last time you Refocused, you recover 2 Focus Points when you Refocus instead of 1.

### Emblazon Antimagic
- **ID:** 4682 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 119
- **Prerequisites:** Emblazon Armament
- **Description:** Your deity's symbol protects against offensive magic. When you Emblazon an Armament, you can choose from the following effects instead of the effects listed in that feat. These effects have the same restrictions as the base options.
  • **Shield:** When the wielder has the shield raised, they gain the shield's circumstance bonus to saving throws against magic, and they can use Shield Block against damage from their enemies' spells.
  • **Weapon:** When the weapon's wielder critically hits with the weapon, they can attempt to counteract a spell on their target, using half their level, rounded up, as the counteract rank. After the attempt, the emblazoned symbol immediately disappears.

### Fortunate Relief
- **ID:** 4683 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Cleric, Fortune
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 119
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your god favors your attempts to remove afflictions and conditions. When you cast a healing spell that attempts to counteract an effect, you can roll the counteract check twice and take the higher value.

### Sapping Symbol
- **ID:** 4684 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Cleric, Divine
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 119
- **Prerequisites:** Raise Symbol
- **Trigger:** While you have your symbol raised, you are about to take damage from a melee attack
- **Description:** Your religious symbol glows with sacred energy, turning the attacker's strength to weakness. Attempt a Religion check against the triggering creature's Will DC. Regardless of the result, the creature is temporarily immune for 1 minute.
  **Critical Success:** The creature is enfeebled 2 until it spends at least 1 action moving away from you.
  **Success:** As critical success, but enfeebled 1.

### Shared Replenishment
- **ID:** 4685 | **Level:** 12
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 119
- **Prerequisites:** Replenishment of War
- **Description:** When your deity's weapon feeds your fervor, you share that divine spark with a nearby ally. When you use Replenishment of War to regain a Focus Point, a willing ally within 30 feet of you who has a focus pool also regains 1 Focus Point, up to their usual maximum.

---

## Level 14 (7 feats)

### Channeling Block
- **ID:** 4686 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 119
- **Prerequisites:** Shield Block
- **Trigger:** You use Shield Block and the shield is your religious symbol
- **Description:** You pour divine energy into a desperate block. When you use Shield Block with your religious symbol, you can sacrifice a prepared harm or heal spell slot. If you do, the shield gains additional temporary Hardness equal to 2 × the spell rank for the Shield Block.

### Deity's Protection
- **ID:** 4687 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 119
- **Prerequisites:** Advanced Domain
- **Description:** Your deity grants your domain powers additional protection. You gain resistance equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum 1) against the damage types associated with your domains' traits (fire for the Fire domain, etc.). When you cast a focus spell from one of your domains, this resistance increases to 2 + your Charisma modifier until the start of your next turn.

### Ebb and Flow
- **ID:** 4688 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** ⬺ (2 actions)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 119
- **Prerequisites:** harmful font and healing font; or Versatile Font
- **Description:** You simultaneously channel your divine font to harm and to heal. You cast both a harm and heal spell, each 2 ranks lower than your highest spell rank (minimum 1st). Choose one of these spells to target a living creature and the other to target an undead creature within range of both spells. You can't apply spellshape or other alterations to either spell.

### Fast Channel
- **ID:** 4689 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** harmful font or healing font
- **Description:** Divine energy flows from you faster than normal. When you cast harm or heal, you reduce the number of actions needed to cast the spell by 1 (minimum 1 action).

### Lasting Armament
- **ID:** 4690 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** Sanctify Armament
- **Description:** Your sacred armaments last far longer. The duration of Sanctify Armament increases to 1 minute.

### Premonition of Clarity
- **ID:** 4691 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** Premonition of Avoidance
- **Description:** Your ability to perceive and avoid danger extends beyond hazards. The +2 circumstance bonus from Premonition of Avoidance also applies to saving throws against traps and to your AC against attacks made by hazards.

### Swift Banishment
- **ID:** 4692 | **Level:** 14
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Trigger:** You critically hit a creature that is not on its home plane
- **Description:** The force of your blow sends your victim back to where it came from. You attempt to cast a 5th-rank *banishment* on the target (using any spell DC). The creature takes a –2 circumstance penalty to the save if it is undead or a fiend.
- **Leads To:** Improved Swift Banishment

---

## Level 16 (5 feats)

### Eternal Bane
- **ID:** 4693 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your deity's negative energy constantly pervades your body and everything around you. You and undead creatures within a 15-foot emanation gain a +2 status bonus to damage with melee Strikes and spell damage rolls against living creatures.

### Eternal Blessing
- **ID:** 4694 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your deity's vital energy constantly pervades your body and everything around you. You and living creatures within a 15-foot emanation gain a +2 status bonus to damage with melee Strikes and spell damage rolls against undead.

### Rebounding Smite
- **ID:** 4695 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** When your divine smite punishes the guilty, some of the energy rebounds to heal you. When you use Channel Smite and deal the additional damage, you regain Hit Points equal to half the additional damage dealt.

### Remediate
- **ID:** 4696 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your healing spells absorb afflictions of all kinds. When you cast a spell from your divine font that restores Hit Points to a target, you can also attempt to counteract one affliction or condition affecting the target. Your counteract rank is equal to half your level, rounded up, and you use your spell attack modifier or your spell DC – 10 as the counteract modifier.

### Resurrectionist
- **ID:** 4697 | **Level:** 16
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 120
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You can bring the dead back to life with your channeled energy. You can cast *resurrect* as a divine innate spell once per day without a material cost, but the target must have died within the last 3 rounds. The target returns at 1 HP.

---

## Level 18 (6 feats)

### Divine Apex
- **ID:** 4698 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You have achieved the pinnacle of divine favor. You gain a +1 status bonus to your spell attack modifier and spell DC. When you critically succeed at a spell attack roll, the target is also stunned 1.

### Echoing Channel
- **ID:** 4699 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** When you energize your allies with channeled energy, some of your power lingers. When you cast heal or harm from your divine font and heal or damage at least one creature, you can choose one of the creatures to gain residual energy. At the start of your next turn, the creature regains Hit Points (or takes damage, if it was harmed) equal to half the amount from the original spell.

### Improved Swift Banishment
- **ID:** 4700 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** Swift Banishment
- **Description:** Your banishing strikes are even more powerful. When using Swift Banishment, the spell rank increases to 9th, and the target takes a –4 circumstance penalty to the save instead of –2.

### Inviolable
- **ID:** 4701 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your divine power is so strong that it prevents enemies from sapping your strength. You gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws against effects that would affect your magic (such as *dispel magic*). If you roll a success on such a save, you get a critical success instead.

### Miraculous Possibility
- **ID:** 4702 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your connection to your deity allows you to perform a miracle when it's most needed. Once per day during your daily preparations, you can choose a divine spell of 7th rank or lower. Until your next daily preparations, you can cast that spell as though it were one of your prepared spells, using a spell slot of its rank.

### Shared Clarity
- **ID:** 4703 | **Level:** 18
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** Premonition of Clarity
- **Description:** When you are granted a premonition of danger, you can share this insight with your allies. The benefits of Premonition of Clarity extend to all allies within 20 feet of you.

---

## Level 20 (4 feats)

### Avatar's Audience
- **ID:** 4704 | **Level:** 20
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** Your deity has deemed you worthy of their personal attention. You can cast a 10th-rank *avatar* spell once per day as a divine innate spell, but the spell has a casting time of 10 minutes rather than 2 actions. While in avatar form, you can perceive through your deity's senses, gaining greater darkvision and a +4 status bonus to Perception checks.

### Avatar's Protection
- **ID:** 4705 | **Level:** 20
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** ⬲ (reaction)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** *avatar* spell prepared
- **Trigger:** You are critically hit
- **Description:** You cast *avatar* from your spell slots. The triggering critical hit is reduced to a normal hit, and its damage is applied after gaining the *avatar* spell's temporary Hit Points.

### Maker of Miracles
- **ID:** 4706 | **Level:** 20
- **Traits:** Cleric
- **Action:** —
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** miraculous spell (class feature)
- **Description:** You are capable of performing more miracles than other clerics. You gain an additional 10th-rank spell slot.

### Spellshape Channel
- **ID:** 4707 | **Level:** 20
- **Traits:** Cleric, Concentrate
- **Action:** ⭓ (free action)
- **Source:** Player Core pg. 121
- **Prerequisites:** —
- **Description:** You combine your mastery of channeled energy with spellshaping. Use one spellshape action you can perform that normally takes 1 action and can be applied to the harm or heal spell. That spellshape applies to all harm or heal spells you cast from your divine font until the end of your turn.

---

## Feat Chains & Prerequisites

### Emblazon Path
- Emblazon Armament (2) → Emblazon Energy (8) / Emblazon Antimagic (12)

### Domain Path
- Domain Initiate (1) → Advanced Domain (8) → Deity's Protection (14)
- Domain Initiate (1) → Domain Focus (12)

### Font Path — Healing
- Healing Hands (1) → Magic Hands (6)
- Communal Healing (2)
- Restorative Channel (8)
- Heroic Recovery (10)

### Font Path — Harming
- Harming Hands (1)
- Sap Life (2)
- Cast Down (6)

### Castigation Path
- Divine Castigation (1) → Castigating Weapon (10)

### Avoidance Path
- Premonition of Avoidance (1) → Shared Avoidance (10)
- Premonition of Avoidance (1) → Premonition of Clarity (14) → Shared Clarity (18)

### Symbol Path
- Raise Symbol (4) → Sapping Symbol (12)
- Raise Symbol (4) → Channeling Block (14)

### Sanctify Path
- Sanctify Armament (8) → Lasting Armament (14)

### War Path
- Replenishment of War (10) → Shared Replenishment (12)

### Banishment Path
- Swift Banishment (14) → Improved Swift Banishment (18)

### Shared Spellcasting Feats
- Reach Spell (1) → Knowledge of Shapes
- Steady Spellcasting (6) → Battlefield Arcana / Ward Casting
